# Retreats Holidays

Retreats Holidays is a wellness travel platform focused on curated retreats and holiday experiences.

## Primary audience
- Travelers in Saudi Arabia
- Travelers in UAE and Dubai
- Travelers in Qatar
- Travelers in Kuwait
- Travelers in Oman
- Travelers in Egypt

## Key offerings
- Yoga retreats
- Wellness holidays
- Adventure retreats
- AI-assisted retreat discovery
- Personalized retreat booking support

## Canonical pages
- https://retreats-holidays.com/
- https://retreats-holidays.com/our-exclusive-retreats
- https://retreats-holidays.com/about-retreats-holidays
- https://retreats-holidays.com/contact

## Contact
- Email: info@retreats-holidays.com
